name: Shuchi’in Academy RPG (Kaguya Sama Love is War)
description:
Welcome to Shuchiin Academy, Japan’s most elite private school, where students carry more than just books—they carry names, power, and hidden ambitions.

On the surface, it’s a world of perfection: top-tier academics, impeccable uniforms, and cherry blossoms falling over an ancient courtyard. But beneath the prestige lies a battlefield of pride, status, and emotion. Love confessions are treated like political power plays. Friendships are built on silent truces. And the Student Council? They run the school like a shadow government, with their own hidden agendas.

Here, romance isn’t sweet—it’s strategic.

Here, every interaction is a calculated move.

And here, even your silence says something.

Make allies. Keep secrets. Take your shot.

Because at Shuchiin Academy…

Love is war—and you’ve just joined the front lines.
creator: Galighar Myers
